heading: Balance billing in cases of non-emergency services performed by nonparticipating providers at certain participating facilities
label: 300gg–132 Balance billing in cases of non-emergency services performed by nonparticipating providers at certain participating facilities

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Subject to subsection (b), in the case of a participant, beneficiary, or enrollee with benefits under a group health plan or group or individual health insurance coverage offered by a health insurance issuer and who is furnished during a plan year beginning on or after , items or services (other than emergency services to which applies) for which benefits are provided under the plan or coverage at a participating health care facility by a nonparticipating provider, such provider shall not bill, and shall not hold liable, such participant, beneficiary, or enrollee for a payment amount for such an item or service furnished by such provider with respect to a visit at such facility that is more than the cost-sharing requirement for such item or service (as determined in accordance with subparagraphs (A) and (B) of of , and of , as applicable).January 1, 2022section 300gg–131 of this titlesection 300gg–111(b)(1) of this title1section 9816(b)(1) of title 26section 1185e(b)(1) of title 29So in original. Probably should be followed by a comma.1

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: Subsection (a) shall not apply with respect to items or services (other than ancillary services described in paragraph (2)) furnished by a nonparticipating provider to a participant, beneficiary, or enrollee of a group health plan or group or individual health insurance coverage offered by a health insurance issuer, if the provider satisfies the notice and consent criteria of subsection (d).

children.label: A
children.text: subject to paragraph (3), items and services related to emergency medicine, anesthesiology, pathology, radiology, and neonatology, whether or not provided by a physician or non-physician practitioner, and items and services provided by assistant surgeons, hospitalists, and intensivists;

children.label: B
children.text: subject to paragraph (3), diagnostic services (including radiology and laboratory services);

children.label: C
children.text: items and services provided by such other specialty practitioners, as the Secretary specifies through rulemaking; and

children.label: D
children.text: items and services provided by a nonparticipating provider if there is no participating provider who can furnish such item or service at such facility.

children.heading: Exception
children.label: 3 Exception
children.text: The Secretary may, through rulemaking, establish a list (and update such list periodically) of advanced diagnostic laboratory tests, which shall not be included as an ancillary service described in paragraph (2) and with respect to which subsection (a) would apply.

children.heading: Clarification
children.label: c Clarification
children.text: In the case of a nonparticipating provider that satisfies the notice and consent criteria of subsection (d) with respect to an item or service (referred to in this subsection as a “covered item or service”), such notice and consent criteria may not be construed as applying with respect to any item or service that is furnished as a result of unforeseen, urgent medical needs that arise at the time such covered item or service is furnished. For purposes of the previous sentence, a covered item or service shall not include an ancillary service described in subsection (b)(2).

children.heading: Notice and consent to be treated by a nonparticipating provider or nonparticipating facility
children.label: d Notice and consent to be treated by a nonparticipating provider or nonparticipating facility
i
children.text: contains the information required under paragraph (2);

children.label: ii
children.text: clearly states that consent to receive such items and services from such nonparticipating provider or nonparticipating facility is optional and that the participant, beneficiary, or enrollee may instead seek care from a participating provider or at a participating facility, with respect to such plan or coverage, as applicable, in which case the cost-sharing responsibility of the participant, beneficiary, or enrollee would not exceed such responsibility that would apply with respect to such an item or service that is furnished by a participating provider or participating facility, as applicable with respect to such plan; and

children.label: iii
children.text: is available in the 15 most common languages in the geographic region of the applicable facility;

children.label: B
children.text: obtains from the participant, beneficiary, or enrollee (or from such an authorized representative) the consent described in paragraph (3) to be treated by a nonparticipating provider or nonparticipating facility; and

children.label: C
children.text: provides a signed copy of such consent to the participant, beneficiary, or enrollee through mail or email (as selected by the participant, beneficiary, or enrollee).

children.label: A
children.text: Notification, as applicable, that the health care provider is a nonparticipating provider with respect to the health plan or the health care facility is a nonparticipating facility with respect to the health plan.

children.label: B
children.text: Notification of the good faith estimated amount that such provider or facility may charge the participant, beneficiary, or enrollee for such items and services involved, including a notification that the provision of such estimate or consent to be treated under paragraph (3) does not constitute a contract with respect to the charges estimated for such items and services.

children.label: C
children.text: In the case of a participating facility and a nonparticipating provider, a list of any participating providers at the facility who are able to furnish such items and services involved and notification that the participant, beneficiary, or enrollee may be referred, at their option, to such a participating provider.

children.label: D
children.text: Information about whether prior authorization or other care management limitations may be required in advance of receiving such items or services at the facility.

children.heading: Consent described to be treated by a nonparticipating provider or nonparticipating facility
children.label: 3 Consent described to be treated by a nonparticipating provider or nonparticipating facility
i
children.text: provided with the written notice under paragraph (1)(A);

children.label: ii
children.text: informed that the payment of such charge by the participant, beneficiary, or enrollee may not accrue toward meeting any limitation that the plan or coverage places on cost-sharing, including an explanation that such payment may not apply to an in-network deductible applied under the plan or coverage; and

children.label: iii
children.text: provided the opportunity to receive the written notice under paragraph (1)(A) in the form selected by the participant, beneficiary or enrollee; and

children.label: B
children.text: documents the date on which the participant, beneficiary, or enrollee received the written notice under paragraph (1)(A) and the date on which the individual signed such consent to be furnished such items or services by such provider or facility.

children.heading: Rule of construction
children.label: 4 Rule of construction
children.text: The consent described in paragraph (3), with respect to a participant, beneficiary, or enrollee of a group health plan or group or individual health insurance coverage offered by a health insurance issuer, shall constitute only consent to the receipt of the information provided pursuant to this subsection and shall not constitute a contractual agreement of the participant, beneficiary, or enrollee to any estimated charge or amount included in such information.

children.heading: Retention of certain documents
children.label: e Retention of certain documents
children.text: A nonparticipating facility (with respect to such facility or any nonparticipating provider at such facility) or a participating facility (with respect to nonparticipating providers at such facility) that obtains from a participant, beneficiary, or enrollee of a group health plan or group or individual health insurance coverage offered by a health insurance issuer (or an authorized representative of such participant, beneficiary, or enrollee) a written notice in accordance with subsection (d)(1)(B), with respect to furnishing an item or service to such participant, beneficiary, or enrollee, shall retain such notice for at least a 7-year period after the date on which such item or service is so furnished.
The terms “nonparticipating provider” and “participating provider” have the meanings given such terms, respectively, in subsection (a)(3) of .section 300gg–111 of this title
The term “participating health care facility” has the meaning given such term in subsection (b)(2) of .section 300gg–111 of this title

children.label: A
children.text: with respect to emergency services (as defined in ) and a group health plan or group or individual health insurance coverage offered by a health insurance issuer, an emergency department of a hospital, or an independent freestanding emergency department, that does not have a contractual relationship with the plan or issuer, respectively, with respect to the furnishing of such services under the plan or coverage, respectively; andsection 300gg–111(a)(3)(C)(i) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: with respect to services described in and a group health plan or group or individual health insurance coverage offered by a health insurance issuer, a hospital or an independent freestanding emergency department, that does not have a contractual relationship with the plan or issuer, respectively, with respect to the furnishing of such services under the plan or coverage, respectively.section 300gg–111(a)(3)(C)(ii) of this title

children.label: A
children.text: with respect to emergency services (as defined in clause (i) of ) that are not described in clause (ii) of such section and a group health plan or group or individual health insurance coverage offered by a health insurance issuer, an emergency department of a hospital, or an independent freestanding emergency department, that has a direct or indirect contractual relationship with the plan or issuer, respectively, with respect to the furnishing of such services under the plan or coverage, respectively; andsection 300gg–111(a)(3)(C) of this title

children.label: B
children.text: with respect to services that pursuant to clause (ii) of , of , and of , as applicable are included as emergency services (as defined in clause (i) of such section and a group health plan or group or individual health insurance coverage offered by a health insurance issuer, a hospital or an independent freestanding emergency department, that has a contractual relationship with the plan or coverage, respectively, with respect to the furnishing of such services under the plan or coverage, respectively.section 300gg–111(a)(3)(C) of this titlesection 9816(a)(3) of title 26section 1185e(a)(3) of title 29
